name: Ascensão T2 — cena de teste (12–15s)
_note: TEST cargo (Session 006 night, genericized Session 007 morning by the Pilot's decision): a 12-15s second-tier transformation scene for an ORIGINAL hero, Aran, to exercise the full governance loop with real creative content. Supersedes the never-committed goku-ssj2 draft — the Pilot reviewed the IP flag and chose 'genericize and commit'; the draft's one generated round was transport-only (zero judgments, zero evidence) and was discarded, to be regenerated against this corpus. The real first cargo remains original characters (registered intent, Session 004) — this cargo now complies with that intent too.
